ol.li:
Reserve MUST be paired with either:
submit() (success)
discard() (error)

Never use pointer after submit:
Memory ownership transferred
Access causes undefined behavior

Check return value:
reserve() may return NULL
Always NULL-check before filling

Fill atomically:
No partial events in buffer
Either full event or nothing

div.p: kprobe/tracepoint handler invoked Need to emit event to userspace
